basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Assistant Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Indore has released the official notification for 1 Assistant Coordinator - Hostel Coordination Unit (HCU) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years The requirements of minimum qualification, experience, and/or age may be relaxed in the case of candidates with outstanding credentials and experience, at the discretion of the HCU.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with at least 50% marks. Desirable: Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology with specializations in CSE/IT/Civil/Mechanical/Electrical.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline with at least an aggregate of 50% marks. Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology with specializations in CSE/IT/Civil/Mechanical/Electrical department (Desirable). 3 years of experience in the relevant field. Experience working in Colleges / Schools/ Hostels (Desirable).

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Personality Test / Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Indore Assistant Coordinator - Hostel Coordination Unit (HCU) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Assistant Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is May 12, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Coordinator post?
faq.answer: A graduate degree in any discipline with at least 50% marks is required. A degree in Science/Engineering/Technology with specific specializations is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Coordinator position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary offered is between ₹40,000 to ₹50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: You need to send a scanned copy of your duly filled application form, CV, and relevant certificates via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Coordinator - Hostel Coordination Unit (HCU) post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for this post?
faq.answer: A degree in Science/Engineering/Technology with specializations in CSE/IT/Civil/Mechanical/Electrical, and experience working in Colleges/Schools/Hostels are desirable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, and Personality Test/Interview.
